title: The contents of THAT BOX
wikitext:
[]: The contents of THAT BOX [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Jul 17, 2009 6:19 am Something that came to my mind after seeing this post. Nebuchadnezzar's Key is said to open the door of human instrumentality. Which makes me wonder if that crazy key landed up being inserted into Eva-01 along with the dummy system. I know it's probably a little wacked, but it would at least explain how Eva-01 goes Gurren Lagann so easily. Gendo had keyed her up to set up Third Impact. I fear this theory is going to be suckered by a new translation)

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 17, 2009 6:23 am Could be. I guess we'll find out soon enough... EDIT: But doesn't Gendo need all the Angels gone for HIS Instrumentality?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Jul 17, 2009 6:33 am I thought the line from the original series was to the effect of "We need to kill all the Angels to fulfill the contract with Lilith". Lilith might be doing something during Eva-01's 3I, because the camera focuses on her briefly when Eva-01 goes all white and wingey.

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Fri Jul 17, 2009 6:41 am I got more the Impression that lilith is doing exactly nothing and that it`s infact not going as planned ,due to showing lilith in 3I context without any action of her.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jul 17, 2009 7:22 am The quick shot to Lilith happened when they mentioned Lilith during that whole sequence.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Jul 17, 2009 7:34 am It happens just after the black hole opens over Tokyo-3. I didn't hear Lilith's name being mentioned by anyone.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jul 17, 2009 7:39 am Ritsuko says it, when Ritsuko and Misato were talking about 3rd impact: Ritsuko wrote: 作戦と言えるの、これが。マギの計算だとしくじる可能性は99.9%。成功したとしてもエヴァ3体を喪失。とても技術部として受け入れられません。リリスと初号機の保護を最優先にすべきです

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Fri Jul 17, 2009 7:48 am Nevertheless, i think the idea the OP has put forward is pretty cool. Can anyone with some Nihongo skills please tell us what Kaji and Gendo are exactly saying when Kaji delivers the key to Gendo? Or what's Gendo saying when they load the Dummy System into Eva-01? There might be a few hints in those lines. 


[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jul 17, 2009 7:55 am http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=258667#258667

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 17, 2009 8:01 am Ornette wrote: Ritsuko says it, when Ritsuko and Misato were talking about 3rd impact

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jul 17, 2009 8:24 am Wrong excerpt. The other one was before 3I started, during the Zeruel fight when Zer gets a giant body. I could have sworn I heard them say Lilith during that babbling they did about 3I starting when I saw it in the theatre, but I guess it was earlier.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 17, 2009 8:37 am Misato does mention Lilith there, but it's about Zeruel advancing further and reaching Lilith (can't do real translation now).
summary: []: The contents of THAT BOX [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Jul 17, 2009 6:19 am Something that came to my mind after seeing this post. Nebuchadnezzar's Key is said to open the door of human instrumentality. Which makes me wonder if that crazy key landed up being inserted into Eva-01 along with the dummy system. I know it's probably a little wacked, but it would at least explain how Eva-01 goes Gurren Lagann
